zh.lifeSummary: Anne Horne於1455年12月之前出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾奧可福德。她於大約1478年與Sir William Norreys結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1505年11月14日在英國英格蘭波克夏亞頓登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anne Horne于1455年12月之前出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾奧可福德。她于大约1478年与Sir William Norreys结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1505年11月14日在英国英格兰波克夏亞頓登。

nameMeanings.name: Horne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, German, and Dutch: variant of   Horn  .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads mostly so named from the dative singular of horn (see Horn ).

variants.name: Horn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hershel, Emanuel, Erez, Yehuda, Ayal, Danit, Doron, Dov, Elad, Elihu, Eran, Haim.

Jewish (Ashkenazic): altered form of Horn 5, originating under Russian influence, since Russian has no h and alters it to g in borrowed words and names. In Israel, the name has been reinterpreted by folk etymology as being from Hebrew goren ‘threshing floor’, which is in fact etymologically and semantically unrelated.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: Anne Horne was born before December 1455, in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir William Norreys about 1478. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 November 1505, in Yattendon, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Anne Horne est née avant décembre 1455, à Oxford, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Sir William Norreys environ 1478. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 novembre 1505, à Yattendon, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Anne Horne wurde vor Dezember 1455 in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat um 1478 Sir William Norreys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. November 1505 in Yattendon, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Anne Horne è nata il prima del dicembre 1455 nel Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Sir William Norreys circa 1478. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 novembre 1505, nel Yattendon, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Horneは1455年12月以前にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアオクスフォードで生まれた。約1478年にSir William Norreysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1505年11月14日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアヤッテンドンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Horne(은)는 1455년 12월 이전 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스퍼드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1478년 Sir William Norreys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1505년 11월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 야텐던에서 사망했다.

pt.before December 1455–14 November 1505: antes dezembro de 1455–14 de novembro de 1505
pt.lifeSummary: Anne Horne nasceu antes dezembro de 1455, em Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Sir William Norreys aproximadamente 1478. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de novembro de 1505, em Yattendon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Anne Horne родилась перед декабрь 1455 г. в местности оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Norreys около 1478 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 ноября 1505 г. в местности яттендон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
